style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial systems diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, legible labels, split into two halves by a thin vertical rule. LEFT half titled INTERFACE: boxes PRIMEVUE (AURA) and TAILWIND combine into a SCREEN box, with small badges SKIP LINK, ARIA-LIVE, WCAG 2.1 AA. RIGHT half titled BUILD AND DELIVERY: a VITE box splits into four stacked chunk boxes VUE, PRIMEVUE, CHARTS, MAPS, then a SERVICE WORKER box precaches a SHELL, leading to an INSTALLABLE PWA box with a small maskable icon and a tag UPDATE ON PROMPT. No logos, no people.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial systems diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, legible labels, split into two halves by a thin vertical rule. LEFT half titled INTERFACE: boxes PRIMEVUE (AURA) and TAILWIND combine into a SCREEN box, with small badges SKIP LINK, ARIA-LIVE, WCAG 2.1 AA. RIGHT half titled BUILD AND DELIVERY: a VITE box splits into four stacked chunk boxes VUE, PRIMEVUE, CHARTS, MAPS, then a SERVICE WORKER box precaches a SHELL, leading to an INSTALLABLE PWA box with a small maskable icon and a tag UPDATE ON PROMPT. No logos, no people.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
